# 🛒 Retail Tycoon (Roblox)

A grocery-store tycoon game: claim a plot, take customers' orders at the
counter, run and grab their items off the shelves, check them out, and spend
your earnings on new departments, upgrades, and staff.

See [`docs/GAME_DESIGN.md`](docs/GAME_DESIGN.md) for the full design.

**Everything is generated by code** — plots, the store building, shelves,
customers, staff. You don't need to build anything in Studio; an empty
baseplate is enough.

---

## How to get this into Roblox Studio

There are two ways. Option A is easiest if you've never used external tools.

### Option A — Copy/paste into Studio (no extra tools)

1. Open Roblox Studio → **New** → **Baseplate**.
2. In the Explorer window, recreate this structure and paste each file's code
   into the matching script (right-click a service → *Insert Object*):

   | File in this repo | Where in Studio | Object type | Name |
   |---|---|---|---|
   | `src/shared/GameConfig.lua` | ReplicatedStorage → Folder `Shared` | **ModuleScript** | `GameConfig` |
   | `src/server/Main.server.lua` | ServerScriptService → Folder `Server` | **Script** | `Main` |
   | `src/server/Util.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `Util` |
   | `src/server/Economy.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `Economy` |
   | `src/server/SaveManager.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `SaveManager` |
   | `src/server/PlotBuilder.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `PlotBuilder` |
   | `src/server/CustomerManager.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `CustomerManager` |
   | `src/server/ItemManager.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `ItemManager` |
   | `src/server/StaffManager.lua` | same `Server` folder | **ModuleScript** | `StaffManager` |
   | `src/client/Main.client.lua` | StarterPlayer → StarterPlayerScripts → Folder `Client` | **LocalScript** | `Main` |

   ⚠️ The folder names (`Shared`, `Server`, `Client`) and script names must
   match exactly — the scripts find each other by name.

3. Press **Play**. Walk onto a glowing green pad to claim your store!

### Option B — Rojo (recommended once you're comfortable)

[Rojo](https://rojo.space) syncs this repo straight into Studio, so you can
edit code in VS Code and keep it in version control.

1. Install the Rojo CLI and the Rojo plugin for Studio (see rojo.space/docs).
2. From this folder, build a place file:
   ```
   rojo build -o RetailTycoon.rbxlx
   ```
3. Open `RetailTycoon.rbxlx` in Studio and press Play. (Or run `rojo serve`
   and connect from the Studio plugin for live syncing while you edit.)

### Enable saving (optional but recommended)

Progress (cash + upgrades) saves with DataStores. In Studio:
**File → Game Settings → Security → Enable Studio Access to API Services** ✅
(The game works fine without it; progress just won't persist.)

---

## How to play

1. **Claim** — step on a glowing green pad in front of an empty store.
2. **Serve** — a customer walks to your counter; their order floats above
   their head. Hold **E** at a shelf to take an item, carry it back, and use
   **Hand Over Items** on the customer.
3. **Checkout** — once their order is all ✅, use **Checkout** to get paid.
   Don't be too slow or they'll leave angry!
4. **Upgrade** — spend cash on the gold pads: new departments (Dairy →
   Bakery → Cosmetics), baskets/carts to carry more, marketing for more
   customers, and eventually hire a **Personal Shopper** and **Cashier** so
   the store runs itself.

## Project layout

```
roblox-retail-tycoon/
├── default.project.json      Rojo project (maps src/ into the game)
├── docs/GAME_DESIGN.md       full game design + roadmap
└── src/
    ├── shared/GameConfig.lua all items, prices, upgrades, tuning knobs
    ├── server/               all gameplay logic (see file headers)
    └── client/               HUD, toasts, tutorial tips
```

**Want to rebalance the game?** Edit only `GameConfig.lua` — every price,
cost, timer, and unlock lives there.
